name: Peanut Butter Picnic Cake
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces Jar Strawberry Jam or Grape Jam
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------PEANUT BUTTER FROSTING---------------------------
1/4 cup Margarine
1/4 cup Peanut Butter
1 teaspoon Vanilla Extract
2 1/2 cups Powdered Sugar
3 tablespoons Milk
Cream margarine and sugar until light and fluffy. Blend in peanut butter, eggs, and vanilla extract. Add combined dry ingredients alternately with milk, mixing well after each addition. Spread 2/3 cup preserves between layers. Frost with Peanut Butter Frosting. Decorate with additional preserves.
Frosting: Cream margarine. Blend in peanut butter, vanilla extract, and salt. Add sugar alternately with milk, beating until light and fluffy.
